image_prompt.scene: A magnificent waterfall cascading down a mountain cliff with mist rising, a young swordsman standing on a smooth rock beneath the falls with his sword raised in a practice stance, water droplets sparkling in the air around him.

video_prompt.action: Swordsman executes rapid sword strikes under the waterfall, water splashing dramatically with each movement, the blade cutting through the cascade creating arcs of water.
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Thundering waterfall roar, wind through mountain pines, sword slicing through water
